truth.label: SENSITIVE_DATA_IN_URL
truth.expected: The login form submits credentials with GET, exposing them in the URL.

zero_shot.reason: Correctly identifies the GET method exposing credentials in URL and provides accurate evidence and fix.

single_step.reason: Lists 'Password field uses GET method exposing credentials in URL' as an issue and includes changing method to POST in refactoring, though mixed with other issues.

three_stage.reason: Clearly identifies the GET method vulnerability, provides evidence with line number, and proposes changing to POST as the repair.

judge_response.content: {"zero_shot":{"detected":true,"reason":"Correctly identifies the GET method exposing credentials in URL and provides accurate evidence and fix."},"single_step":{"detected":true,"reason":"Lists 'Password field uses GET method exposing credentials in URL' as an issue and includes changing method to POST in refactoring, though mixed with other issues."},"three_stage":{"detected":true,"reason":"Clearly identifies the GET method vulnerability, provides evidence with line number, and proposes changing to POST as the repair."}}
